'''Mael Sidras''' was a [[Senator/Legends|Senator]]. Sidras was subject to an assassination attempt by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], which resulted in the [[Death/Legends|deaths]] of all beings aboard the [[Passenger liner/Legends|passenger liner]] ''[[Savage Pleasure]]''.<ref name="CRO" />
